database.exportDesc: Export all data to a JSON file for backup or transfer.
database.importDesc: Import data from a previously exported JSON file.
database.resetDesc: Erase all data and restore the application to its original state.
database.resetConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete all your data, including characters, chats, personas, settings, API keys, and writing instructions. The application will be restored to its original state. This action cannot be undone.
database.resetSuccess: Database has been reset to its default state
